content.en:
Dark forbidden land, forbidden land of sea and sky.

Ye Tian's copy body came here from the Sea Heaven Holy Sect through the door.

For the first time, Ye Tian's body and the replicating body shared the memory, and after a short period of fusion, the ontology and the replicating body completely shared the memory.

At this moment, Ye Tian's body naturally also obtained the Sect Peak Ancestor Method and the Endless Ancestor Method created by copying his body in the Sacred Domain Heaven and Earth.

"It's time to go to the Sea and Sky Forbidden Land and bring those resources back from the hands of the copy body!"

Ye Tian tore through the void in one step, came to the vicinity of the Sea and Sky Forbidden Land, and immediately crossed over in one step.

At the same time, Ye Tian's replica body was also nearby, and the main body came into contact with the replicated body.

Ye Tian's copy body immediately handed those resources to the main body, and immediately began to pretend to fight.

Bang!!!!

Ye Tian's copy body was blown away by a punch, and then other strange beasts rushed to besiege Ye Tian, but Ye Tian left easily.

"Damn the Ancestor, he has invaded our base again!"

One of the beasts roared.

Ye Tian's body invaded every once in a while, and he didn't actually do anything, just to prepare for this time.

If it has not invaded the Sea and Sky Forbidden Land, and the replicating body has invaded as soon as it comes, it will be too suspicious, and it will not be good if it arouses the suspicion of those two supreme holy beasts.

Therefore, Ye Tian occasionally invaded the forbidden land of the sea and sky.

In this way, the source of replicating the body will not be suspected.

In the following days, Ye Tian's copy body, the Heyuan Holy Beast, stayed in the Haitian Forbidden Land for a period of time before leaving the Haitian Forbidden Land and returned to the Holy Realm Heaven and Earth, working hard for the eternal construction method of seeking the door.

And Ye Tian's body also had something to do, that is, to cultivate the Endless Ancestor Law created from the Sacred Realm Heaven and Earth, and impact the Supreme Ancestor Realm.

Once he reached the Supreme Ancestor realm, his combat power far surpassed that of the present, and at that time, he didn't have to worry about anything, and he didn't need to worry about the future revenge of the bone clan.

But Ye Tian cultivated the Endless Ancestor Method of the Sacred Realm Heaven and Earth, but found it very difficult.

After all, this was the Endless Ancestor Law of the Sacred Realm Heaven and Earth, which was incompatible with the rules of the Dark Forbidden Realm, so it was difficult to cultivate, and if it weren't for the countless resources from the Sacred Realm Heaven and Earth, he wouldn't be able to do it if he wanted to fuse the Endless Ancestor Method.

In the blink of an eye, more than a thousand realm years have passed.

On this day, Ye Tiancai fused the Endless Ancestor Method from the Sacred Domain Heaven and Earth, and on this Ancestor Method, he had reached the elite Ancestor combat power, and he was not far from the top Ancestor.

Subsequently, Ye Tian began to refine the resources from the Sacred Realm Heaven and Earth, which had taken the accumulation of endless years of copying the body of the Heyuan Holy Beast, and this resource had a great effect on Ye Tian, many of which surpassed the bone beads.

Gradually, Ye Tian's second Endless Ancestor Law Dao was also raised to the top Ancestor combat power, and it continued to improve.

The years of a realm era have passed, and Ye Tian's Sacred Domain Heaven and Earth Endless Ancestor Law has also been cultivated to the extreme by Ye Tian, and his cultivation has reached the point where he cannot advance.

The two Endless Ancestor Methods made Ye Tian's strength reach an incomparably terrifying level.

Now, he had touched the shackles of the underworld, and once he fused the two Endless Ancestor Methods, he would be able to break the shackles, and the two Ancestor Bodies would also merge into one, turning into the Strongest Ancestor Body.

This step is also time-consuming and not so easy to do.

As far as he knew, it took one of the Sea-Sky Holy Sect's supreme holy beasts a great tribulation to finally complete the breakthrough.

Strictly speaking, the supreme holy beast of the Sea and Sky Holy Sect only entered the Dark Forbidden Domain during the first tribulation of the Dark Forbidden Domain, and until the second great tribulation, he still did not complete the breakthrough, but entered the Dark Forbidden Domain again, in fact, at that time, he had already created the second holy law, but it was difficult to fuse.

After the second tribulation, a full six dark eclipse time had passed before he broke through to the Supreme Holy Beast realm.

It can be seen from this that it is very difficult to fuse the two Endless Ancestor Methods, and it is not possible to complete the breakthrough all at once.

If it was so easy to break through, the powerhouses of the level of the Supreme Ancestor, Bone Emperor, and Supreme Holy Beast would not be so rare.

After all, during every great tribulation, there are many strong people from foreign lands, but among so many strong people, there are few who can really break through.

Now, the Dark Forbidden Realm has passed through three dark calendars, and is now in the period from the third to the fourth dark calendar.

Ye Tian didn't have high requirements for himself, he only needed to complete the breakthrough before the next catastrophe arrived.

Of course, he didn't think that his talent would be so bad, it would take that long, at most a dark calendar time, and he would be able to complete the breakthrough.

And a dark calendar has 108 realm eras, which is enough for him to go to enlightenment and fusion.

One dark age after another has passed, and the entire Dark Forbidden Domain has not changed much, except that the Dark Forbidden Domain has given birth to some more ancestors.

Most of these ancestors were from the human race, but the Dark Soul Domain also gave birth to many ancestors, and the Dark Sacred Domain and the Dark Destruction Domain also gave birth to several ancestors, such as a superiority domain ancestor of the Battle Gate who stepped into the Ancestor Realm.

It is worth mentioning that the Dao Mountain Realm controlled by the human race has given birth to many Holy Realms, and the Xuanxu Ancestral Realm has become much stronger, very close to the Primordial Ancestral Realm.

Although the Primordial Ancestral Realm is also an Ancestral Realm, it is actually a little higher than the ordinary Ancestral Realm.

According to Ye Tian's estimation, although the Creation Mixed Yuan Well can allow the Xuanxu Ancestral Realm to surpass the ordinary Ancestral Realm, at most it can reach the level of the Primordial Ancestral Realm, this is its limit, and it is impossible to really surpass the Primordial Ancestral Realm.

After all, it was just a treasure born from a Dark Holy Land, how could it surpass the most powerful world in the Dark Holy Land, the Primordial Ancestral Realm.

In this regard, Ye Tian was already satisfied.

If Ye Tian stepped into the realm of the strongest ancestor and nourished the Xuanxu Ancestral Realm with the breath of the strongest ancestor, maybe he could really hope to break the shackles of the Xuanxu Ancestor Realm and promote it to another level, the Supreme Ancestor Realm!

The name of the Supreme Ancestral Realm was taken by Ye Tian, and it came from the division of the Supreme Holy Beast Realm of the Haitian Holy Sect.

The headquarters of the Haitian Holy Sect was located in the Haitian Holy Beast Realm, which was a supreme holy beast realm, and its world power far exceeded that of the Primordial Ancestral Realm.

It is said that for a long time, the Haitian Holy Beast Realm was not so powerful, and it was only through the efforts of the two Supreme Sacred Beasts that the transformation was completed.

If you break the shackles and are promoted to the strongest ancestor, under the infusion of the origin of the Dark Forbidden Domain, the ancestral realm will have a certain chance of transformation.

Of course, the premise is that Ye Tian must break through in the Xuanxu Ancestral Realm to have such a chance.

Ten Dark Ages!

Twenty Dark Ages!

Thirty Dark Ages!

......

Before you know it, the fourth Dark Sanctuary in the Dark Forbidden Realm is about to appear.

At the same time, Ye Tian was finally about to complete the fusion of the two Endless Ancestor Methods, breaking the shackles, causing the two Ancestor bodies to fuse and be promoted to the Strongest Ancestor.

this day.

"The breakthrough is now!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.
